warnings: entrypoint size limit: js/editor (315 KiB), js/screen (342 KiB)

fixesApplied.description: Added text-charcoal class to topic tag pill span to ensure charcoal text on accent-lighter background in dark mode, preventing WCAG contrast failure.

Added alt text fallback to wp_get_attachment_image() in PHP. Now fetches attachment alt via get_post_meta() and falls back to post title when empty, matching TSX behavior (featuredImage.alt_text || postTitle).
No fix applied. Eyebrow span inherits correct text color from .dark context. Current behavior is correct per QA assessment.

Moved not-last:mb-8 not-last:md:mb-12 margin classes from

to the .group wrapper div. The

was the only child of .group so not-last never matched, resulting in zero gap between description and button. Now the .group div itself carries the margin, creating the expected 32px (md: 48px) gap.
Changed topic tag row margin from not-last:mb-4 (16px) to not-last:mb-6 (24px) to match Figma's 24px gap between topic tag row and heading.
Added not-last:md:mb-12 alongside existing not-last:mb-8 on the heading wrapper div, providing 48px gap on desktop (md+) and 32px on mobile, matching Figma's desktop spacing.
